Top up wherever you already stop.

No charger to carry. No outlet to hunt for. Just roll up to a solar-powered station and top up in three simple steps, so range anxiety disappears and you ride more.

1

Select your e-bike model

Pick your model so the station sends exactly the right charge.

2

Plug in & lock up

Connect your bike and lock it in place. It's safe while it fills up.

3

Walk away

Grab a coffee, take a swim, enjoy the day. Come back to a full battery.

Everyone enjoys biking more than driving. Let's keep it that way.

Better rides are better together.

Coast is built for the group ride. Friends meeting at the pier, families rolling to the farmers market, a whole crew heading to the show. Everyone charges. Everyone stays.

Become a Coast Charger Host.

Parks, breweries, festivals, cafés: give riders a reason to stop, stay, and come back. It's off-grid and solar, so it can show up for an event, then roll on to the next one. No wiring, no permits, no infrastructure.
